title: Doflamingo's Secret Begins to Break
description: Pages 11–15 focus on doflamingo's secret begins to break, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as after Sugar's defeat, the restored fighters and citizens flood Dressrosa with confusion while Usopp becomes the unlikely hero who broke the country's hidden curse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: usop....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: usop... of the straw hat pirates...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is this the man who is going to save us all....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Beheh!! You're clutching at Straws!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's ALL OR NOTHING NOW!! HISSATSU: Midoribosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Platanus...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Shuriken!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: usoland!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We've received reports that the young master is on the first floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's someone who looks like me here in the palace?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This sword looks just right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If I can become human again, it will serve me well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Your majesty...!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: My father was competing in the colosseum today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Huh? Really?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He was shaken by the events of this morning, just like the rest of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Colos- Seum.......!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A young lad has committed murder!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Two people were killed during a scrap in the slums!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And as for the culprit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We can't let him near King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: He may be just a boy, but his acts of delin- query are infamous throughout the land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Boy from the slums - kyros (15 years old)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: His majesty is in danger! Shoot the boy dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Don't shoot!! Lower your weapons!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Your name is kyros, boy...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Come with me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Kyros, the fifteen- year-old murderer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: This is the Sacred Col- OSSEUM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Such poten- til!! with a blade, that would have been fatal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: So what amounts to barbarity in the outside world...here is "potential", eh?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: He beat the fellow com- petitors in his room to within an inch of their lives...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: He hasn't eaten for six days...and he won't speak a word to anyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Well, actually, he does say just one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: "Bring me King Riku"...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: My enemies were a group!! They killed my friend!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: So I killed them in return!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: BOY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Are you an animal?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I thought you of all people might under- stand me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: bring him food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: He still has the will to live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: No matter how long it takes, if I win a hundred matches you'll grant me parole?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Four months later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: One hundred matches, one hundred Victor- Ries!!! Not even our star com- batants can touch him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Yeah- hhhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Kyros has won his freedom faster than anyone could have imagined!!

summary: Doflamingo's Secret Begins to Break develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
